message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
}

actor ScooterOwner as SO
boundary Dashboard as DB
control BikeService as BS
control ClaimsService as CS
entity bike as BI
entity Claim as CL

SO -> DB : lockBike
activate SO
activate DB

DB -> BS : lockBike(bike)
activate BS

BS -> BI : lockBike(bike)
activate BI
BI --> BS : bike
deactivate BI

BS --> DB : bike
deactivate BS

DB --> SO : bike
deactivate DB

SO -> DB : unlockBike
activate DB

DB -> BS : unlockBike(bike)
activate BS

BS -> BI : unlockBike(bike)
activate BI
BI --> BS : bike
deactivate BI

BS --> DB : bike
deactivate BS

DB --> SO : bike
deactivate DB
deactivate SO
@enduml
